game: Legacy of the Wizard (NES / Dragon Slayer IV)
note: Structured objective DAG mirroring agent/route.md (distilled from the U Can Beat narrated walkthrough). Phases are the top-level DAG; each phase's step-by-step detail (exact locations, block placements, boss strategies) is in route.md. This is the OPTIMIZED route: crowns are collected Xemn-area -> Lyll -> Meyna -> Pochi-area so boss difficulty (fixed by crown COUNT) ramps with the growing item kit. Pochi only does the opening item run (he can't equip the Power Fist that every boss needs).

abilities: only one who can use the Gloves to push/slide/ride blocks
Xemn.with_armor: becomes invulnerable like Pochi (but drains magic)

abilities: Key Stick opens doors using magic not keys
only one who can use the Mattock to destroy rocks (costs magic)
warps via portraits once all 4 crowns are held

key_mechanics.keys: kill enemies while holding <2 keys -> they tend to drop keys
key_mechanics.inn: 10 gold -> near-full refill of life+magic; use freely
key_mechanics.blocks_reset: leaving a screen resets glove blocks (recover from puzzle mistakes)
key_mechanics.pause_jump: pause then jump to escape spike pits / cancel fall damage
key_mechanics.death: dying in the labyrinth loses everything since the last house visit (keep a password)
key_mechanics.hub: the 'dragon room' / crossroads — every character run starts here; Keela sleeps here

gloves.location: right of the start, past a couple breakable blocks (only Xemn can use them)

crystal_1.location: down the left ladder near the start

power_fist.location: Pochi's section: ride the Brandy enemy, push through the top false wall (4x dmg, 2x magic; Pochi can't equip it)

rod.location: hub area, up-right chest (Meyna's block tool)

power_boots.location: Xemn's area: real chest under a fake-chest enemy (stomp enemies, no magic)

mattock.location: Xemn's area: right above the shop, behind a false block (Lyll destroys rocks)

wings.location: Lyll's area: volcano room, drop through the floor hole (Meyna flies)

fire_rod.location: Lyll's area: boost off a slime left (optional; only Pochi can equip)

shield.location: BOUGHT for 95 gold at a hidden shop in Meyna's area (break a hidden block -> attack the inn sign); blocks boss projectiles

key_stick.location: Meyna's area, far left: next-to-last block is a secret hole

armor.location: Meyna's blue cave: fly far left (invulnerability, drains magic)

jump_shoes.location: Meyna's area: end of a moo-guarded door corridor; Crystal out immediately

dragon_slayer.location: Lyll's area, bottom/volcano: jump off a slime into the painting, hold left onto the green platform (only weapon vs Keela)

bosses_fixed_order.strategy: close in, Power Fist, a few hits
close in, Power Fist mash; little contact damage
Shield ON (attacks before visible); Power Fist when close; re-equip Shield after the kill
Shield ON, corner, Power Fist; re-equip Shield after; never touch the body
infinite magic; wait for it to land at the back, jump-attack the FACE at max range, back away; never hit it airborne; don't touch the flaming bones after death
